subparts.text: Describe the classical approach to management thought. 1
Outline the roles of a manager as per Henry Mintzberg. 1
What are the traits of an effective leader? 3
What is benchmarking in the context of control? 4
Why is the control function considered important in management? 4

questions.question_text: Define management. Discuss its nature, process, and significance in modern organizations. 1
Compare and contrast classical, neo-classical, and behavioral approaches to management thought. 1
Define planning. Explain the planning process in detail and discuss its importance in an organization. 2
Define authority, responsibility, and delegation. Discuss the principles of delegation and its importance in effective management. 2
Explain McGregor’s Theory X and Theory Y, and Ouchi’s Theory Z. Discuss their relevance in today’s organizational context. 3
What is leadership? Explain the various leadership styles as per Likert’s Systems and the Managerial Grid. 3
Define controlling and explain the steps in the control process with relevant examples. 4
Explain traditional and modern techniques of control. Compare their features and effectiveness. 4
